explanations: Finalists were recalculated through the complete build calculator.
Main Hand: Attack Assist Defense supplies +4 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Off Hand: Attack Assist Defense supplies +4 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Chest: Attack Assist Defense supplies +2 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Legs: Attack Assist Defense supplies +2 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Necklace: Assist Attack Defense supplies +3 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Ring 1: Assist Attack Defense supplies +3 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Ring 2: Assist Attack Defense supplies +3 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Boss Ranged Heavy Attack Chance: 44370 at priority 1; normalized contribution +0.903.
Boss Ranged Critical Hit Chance: 36950 at priority 2; normalized contribution +0.259.
Skill Damage Boost: 3680 at priority 3; normalized contribution +0.013.
Critical Damage: 5110 at priority 4; normalized contribution +0.013.
Heavy Attack Damage: 520 at priority 5; normalized contribution +0.000.
Boss Ranged Hit Chance: 14184 at priority 6; normalized contribution +0.004; minimum 7000 met.
Cooldown Speed: 6160 at priority 7; normalized contribution +0.000; minimum 4000 met.
No selected goal finished below the fixed objective baseline.
assumptions: Item Potentials are excluded from calculations and recommendations in this release; same-item selections are preserved.
59 available attribute points were redistributed across STR, DEX, INT, PER, and CON.
This is a theoretical catalogue build. Ownership and acquisition cost are not scored.
Eight passive skills were selected at up to level 20.
Crossbow mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Dagger mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Only decoded-proven persistent Skill Cores are optimized; conditional or unsupported cores receive no invented static value.
The game allows repeated Equipment Skills, but exact scoring activates only one copy in the current fixed-level catalogue.
Exactly three normal rune sockets are considered; normal rune rows may repeat.
No more than one Chaos rune is used per item.
warnings: This is a bounded search, so the result is the best loadout found rather than proof of the mathematical global optimum.
